name: Coonmart Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large pot, brown the beef, onions, and garlic; drain off any excess fat.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for several hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve with shredded cheddar cheese and chopped onion toppings.
